title: 34Pc Hose Clamp Set - 8 Assorted Sizes Clip Clamps, Zinc Plated | 27-70Mm Tool Pipe Fitting, Connectors. Plumbing Hand Tools | Durable Clamping Kit
features: DIY REPAIRS - These hose clamps are just what you need when you have to make repairs to your home or automobile. It comes with a wide variety of clamp sizes so you don't have to concerned about which size you need, you can just try it until it fits. These hose clamps did get the job done well, no leaking at all
EASY TO USE - Just need use a screwdriver to loosen the screw of hose clamp, then thread the pipe through the hose clamp and adjust the size to fitting your hose's size and tighten the screw
LONG LASTING - It can be reused and recycle if you do not want them to stay on the original place due to the high quality material which makes them worked last for long

DURABILITY - All the hose clamps including the band, housing and screw are made of 304 stainless steel, with high performance of corrosion resistance and acid resistance, they are strong and durable, when installing on the pipe, you will no longer worry about them rusting and breaking.

ADJUSTABLE - All the hose clamps with screws, you can adjust the size according to the diameter of the pipe, clamps are flexible and ductile, so you can install and remove them at any time. The range of clamps represents the minimum and maximum sizes they can be adjusted.
description: 34PC HOSE CLAMP SET 8 ASSORTED SIZES CLIP CLAMPS ZINC PLATED 27-70MM TOOL PIPES 34 PC PIECE HOSE CLAMP ASSORTMENT : 2 x 2.75" 2 x 2.5" 4 x 2.25" 4 x 2" 6 x 1.75" 6 x 1.5" 6 x 1.25" 4 x 1.06"
